headline: How Yum Brands executives work together on value
summary: Executives with Taco Bell, KFC and Habit Burger & Grill share ideas and strategies to win over consumers. That has come in handy as value becomes vital for consumers

headline: YUM to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards for the Stock?
summary: Yum! Brands is set to report Q1 2026 on April 29, with EPS and revenues seen rising as Taco Bell and KFC gain, while Pizza Hut costs and closures weigh.

raw.headline: YUM to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards for the Stock?
raw.summary: Yum! Brands is set to report Q1 2026 on April 29, with EPS and revenues seen rising as Taco Bell and KFC gain, while Pizza Hut costs and closures weigh.

headline: Domino's Pizza stock falls on disappointing sales — and CEO thinks more chains will follow
summary: CEO Russell Weiner said he expects more fast-food chains will report that winter weather and weak consumer sentiment hurt their quarterly sales.

raw.headline: Domino's Pizza stock falls on disappointing sales — and CEO thinks more chains will follow
raw.summary: CEO Russell Weiner said he expects more fast-food chains will report that winter weather and weak consumer sentiment hurt their quarterly sales.
